rag_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in the component type scope and implementation annexes in the implementation scope
Use only visible identifiers from the current target component or implementation
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Maintain the original AADL structure when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use only visible identifiers from the current target component or implementation
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
